\tzpentry{ID4817}{Eigenvalue}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4817 introduces Eigenvalue as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\tf(\\lambda x) = \\lambda^D f(x) \\implies D \\approx 3/2\n\\end{equation}
